---
title: "[ISSUE_ID]: [TITLE]"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Problem Description

**Status:** [STATUS]
**Priority:** [PRIORITY]
**Category:** [CATEGORY]

### User Report

> "[USER_NOTES]"

## Investigation

### Files Involved

```{python}
#| echo: false
files = ["file1.ts", "file2.ts"]
for f in files:
    print(f"- {f}")
```

### Root Cause Analysis

[Analysis content]

## Solution

### Changes Made

[Description of fix]

### Code

```{typescript}
// Fixed code
```

## Verification

```{bash}
npm test -- [test-file]
```

## Status History

| Date | Status | Actor |
|------|--------|-------|
| [DATE] | NEW | User |
| [DATE] | In Progress | AI |
| [DATE] | AI Attempted Fix | AI |
| [DATE] | Fixed | User |
